narrative:
Wayne Twp township has 523 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.3 percentage points.
